stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are correct with regards to aircraft performance classes and the corresponding aircraft characteristics?

1. Class C contains piston engined aircraft that have greater than a MTOM of 5700 kg
2. Class A contains turbojet aircraft only
3. Class C contains propeller driven aircraft only
4. Class B aircraft have 9 or fewer passenger seats
5. Class B aircraft have a MTOM of 5700 kg or greater
6. Class A aircraft can have 9 or fewer passenger seats
